headline: Tesla’s AI Bet vs. Ford’s Truck Fortress: Two Paths to Profitability in 2026
summary: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) and Ford Motor (NYSE:F) just delivered earnings reports that read like dispatches from two different industries. Tesla posted Q1 2026 results powered by AI, autonomy, and margin recovery. Ford closed out Q4 2025 with a heavy EV writedown and a turnaround pitch built around trucks, vans, and software for fleets. Margin Snapback at ... Tesla’s AI Bet vs. Ford’s Truck Fortress: Two Paths to Profitability in 2026

headline: myKaarma Selected as Ford Dealer Technology Preferred Partner for Video Capability
summary: myKaarma, a leading provider of end-to-end service lane technology solutions built to help franchise auto dealerships streamline service leads, operations and payments, enhance customer experience, and improve service efficiency, is now a Ford Dealer Technology Preferred Partner.

headline: Reassessing Ford Motor (F) Valuation After Mixed Recent Share Price Performance
summary: Ford Motor (F) in focus as investors weigh recent performance and valuation Ford Motor (F) is back on many watchlists after a mixed set of recent returns, with the stock up over the past month but lower over the past 3 months and year to date. See our latest analysis for Ford Motor. At a share price of US$12.38, Ford’s recent 8.9% 1 month share price return contrasts with an 11.1% 3 month share price decline, while its 1 year total shareholder return of 29.9% reflects a stronger longer term...

headline: Vehlo’s Solutions Now Support the Requirements of the Ford Commitment Program
summary: KNOXVILLE, Tenn., April 27, 2026--Total Customer Connect and Dealerlogix, driven by Vehlo, are providing their fixed operations software and communications platforms to Ford dealerships nationwide as part of a select group of Preferred Partners. The partnership focuses on Ford’s commitment to Video Multi-Point Inspections.
